title: justicia neurantha
intro: Justicia neurantha, also known as the blue beard or justicia, is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia. Its leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Justicia neurantha include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Justicia neurantha typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
